title: 24 Inch Stone Faucet Mat for Kitchen Sink,Kitchen Sink Splash Guard-Stone Drying Mat Kitchen,Super Absorbent, Diatomite Protector with Drainage for Kitchen Bathroom Counter(White)
features: 【Magic Sponge Effect】‌Science wins! The small pores of diatomaceous earth can quickly absorb splashes and dry within a few minutes.Stone faucet mat for kitchen sink absorbs 1/4 cup water in 3 sec. Your morning coffee splash disappears before you finish saying 'Oops' – no towel needed!

【Flood Control Pro】‌Faucet mat has deep and wide back shaped grooves, which are suitable for use as absorbent pads for faucet countertop。Laboratory data proof，12oz spill capacity (that's 2 wine glasses!) stays trapped in 3D trenches. Finally – one stone tap mat for kitchen sink holds one promise.

【Spa-Worthy Organization】‌Our stone drying tray is suitable to be used as absorbent mats for soaps, cups, dish sponge, lotions etc, Holds full-size products without crowding. Wake up to a bathroom that looks like a 5-star hotel – not a frat house after party night.

【5-Minute Rebirth】‌Our quick dry stone mat for kitchen sink is designed to be durable, safe and harmless.Like new forever! Monthly 30-sec sanding with sandpaper we provide (easier than filing nails) restores 100% absorption.

【More application scenarios】This modern design of faucet mat for kitchen sink splash guard mat blends beauty with everyday practicality. Perfect for kitchens, bathrooms, RVs, bars and cafes, laundry areas, or anywhere you need to keep spaces dry. Keep your sink clean and impress your guests.
